name: Hifood Group Holdings Co., Limited
summary: Hifood Group Holdings Co., Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, exports, and sells fine jewelry and related products in the Americas, Mainland China, Russia, rest of Asia, rest of Europe, and internationally. The company offers a range of fine jewelry products in karat gold, including rings, earrings, pendants, necklaces, bracelets, bangles, cufflinks, brooches, and anklets. It offers its jewelry products to wholesalers and retailers. The company was formerly known as KTL International Holdings Group Limited and changed its name to Hifood Group Holdings Co., Limited in October 2017. Hifood Group Holdings Co., Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Hifood Group Holdings Co., Limited is a subsidiary of HNA Aviation Investment Holding Company Ltd.
